series_metadata.series_description: Any files that the backoffice system either sends or receives through interfaces with other entities including, but not limited to, the Toll Collection System, Bureau of Motor Vehicles/Department of Motor Vehicles, Print and Mail House, Lockbox, and Collections

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Available online for 1 year. After 1 year, files are archived to offline storage for 3 years. Purged after 3 years., Electronic: Delete
